title: Panayur Palur Shiva Temple
tagline: Panayur Palur Shiva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Panayur Shiva Temple is located at Vaniyamkulam village in Palakkad district, in Kerala, India.
overview.description: Panayur Shiva Temple is located at Vaniyamkulam village in Palakkad district, in Kerala, India. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva, located in main Sanctum Sanctorum, facing East. According to folklore, sage Parashurama has installed the idol. It is the part of the 108 Shiva Temples of Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pathamkulam
topPlaces.description: Pathamkulam is a village and ward in Palakkad district, Kerala, India, about 3 kilometers from Vaniamkulam. Pathamkulam translates to "land of 10 ponds".

topPlaces.name: Puramathra
topPlaces.description: Puramathra is a village in Kulukkallur panchayath in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kulukkallur
topPlaces.description: Kulukkallur is a village and gram panchayat in Pattambi Taluk, Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Chalavara
topPlaces.description: Chalavara is a village and gram panchayat in Palakkad district, Kerala, India. It is the location of the K. T. N. College of Pharmacy.

topPlaces.name: Shoranur
topPlaces.description: Shoranur (Malayalam: [ʂorɳuːr]) is a town and municipality located on the banks of the Bharathapuzha River, in the Palakkad district of Kerala. The town is spread over an area of 32.28 km2.

topPlaces.name: Kulappully
topPlaces.description: Kulappully (also written as Kulappulli), located in the Palakkad District, state of Kerala, India., is a suburb of Shoranur municipality.

topPlaces.name: Mannanur, Palakkad
topPlaces.description: Mannanur is a village on the banks of Bharathappuzha river in Palakkad district of Kerala state in India.

topPlaces.name: Ananganadi
topPlaces.description: Ananganadi is a village in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India. Ananganadi is located equidistant from the towns of Ottapalam to the south and Cherpulassery to its north, both about 10 km from Ananganadi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Panayur Palur Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Panayur Palur Shiva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Panayur Palur Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (76 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Panayur Palur Shiva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Panayur Palur Shiva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Panayur Palur Shiva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Panayur Palur Shiva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Panayur Palur Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pathamkulam, Puramathra, Kulukkallur, Chalavara, Shoranur.
